name: Exponential Growth Calculator
seo_title: Exponential Growth Calculator – Free Online Tool
seo_description: Use our free exponential growth calculator to quickly estimate final based on p0, r, t. No registration needed.
example_label: Calculate growth of 1000 at 5% for 10 years.
result_context: The final value {final} after exponential growth over the time period.
steps: Initial P₀ = 150, rate r = 3.5% = 0.035, time t = 8 years
mistakes: Using percentage directly instead of decimal (3.5 vs 0.035)
Using (1+r)^t instead of e^(rt) for continuous growth
Confusing exponential growth with linear growth
desc: Free online exponential growth calculator. Enter initial value and rate % to get instant results.
